response.justification: Bogdan brings 25+ years of engineering breadth, current hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) that matches this role's AI-native baseline, and strong TypeScript — but the must-have of strong Python is entirely absent from the resume, and his genuinely high-throughput distributed-systems work (millions of requests/second at Sociomantic) dates to 2011–2013. Evidence of staff-scope technical strategy, cross-functional stakeholder management, and operational/on-call ownership is thin; recent roles read as senior full-stack IC rather than domain-level technical leadership.
strengths: Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure experience: MCP code generators and frameworks supporting agentic workflows
Real high-throughput, low-latency systems background (microservices handling millions of HTTP requests/second with async I/O)
Strong TypeScript/Node.js depth plus polyglot breadth, with a demonstrated craftsmanship and testing culture (TDD, CI/CD, open-source maintainership)
concerns: No Python anywhere on the resume — a must-have skill for this role
High-throughput distributed-systems experience is over a decade old; recent work is full-stack product engineering at smaller scale
Little demonstrated staff-level technical strategy, cross-functional stakeholder management, or incident-response/on-call ownership
